Name: -1_taste_movies_likes_bad
Representative_Docs: ['My friend Lisa just does not seem to care at all about her things. She often just gets the cheapest thing and then trashes her home. She has no appreciation for the finer things in life.', "I generally don't pay attention to artists whose works I consider in bad taste, but I suppose someone like Miley Cyrus comes to mind.  Her works scream for attention and she dresses and acts like a slut for shock value.", "The one thing that I think this person has is poor taste in the movie genres he watches. He likes to watch Lifetime movies which usually involve men who aren't treating women well and he likes horror movies. He isn't some deviant person and is really nice actually, but I feel he has poor taste in movies. This is really a hard question to answer. The only other thing I can think of is his taste in food. He puts hot sauce on everything he eats and he also like eating moose heart and liver, which is gross."]

Name: 0_taste_bad_poor_think
Representative_Docs: ["Well, I would have to say yes I know someone who I consider to have bad taste. There is a difference though between someone who doesn't know any better versus someone that knows how to act but ignores that fact. Again, to me taste and style are two different animals. Style can change and evolves, I think but taste is more of a character quality.  And I am a huge snob probably lol, although I would never tell anyone or show in any way that I thought someone acted in bad taste or had bad style either way. That would be in bad taste, in my opinion.", "I can't think of anyone with poor taste.", 'I don’t know anyone who has bad taste']

Name: 1_clothes_think_clothing_just
Representative_Docs: ["This person dresses in baggy clothes and has a poor taste wear the clothes are not fitted and the fashion is outdated and the clothes don't match well with the shoes and colors.", 'I\'m going to pick one of my past co-workers who used to come to work with mismatched clothing & suits. His clothing looked cheaply made & just not nice to look at & he made good money & wasn\'t poor. His desk was always messy & when we went out to lunch his choices in foods were unappealing & kinda "gross"! I just don\'t think he had good taste in many things.', "I have a sister in law who just doesn't have good taste at all. The way she dresses had not a bit of style to it. She mainly just puts her clothes on and goes and they don't flatter her at all. She doesn't try to decorate her home up and put nice touches to it."]

Name: 2_person_lack_like_depth
Representative_Docs: ['Yeah, nice guy. Not really dumb but just accepts everything at face value. Runs towards novelty instead of depth or something that may require a bit of thought. Embraces (albeit briefly) every flash-in-the-pan idea that crosses his path.', "The person I'm thinking of seems to revel in low culture and epitomizes someone that loves low bro tv, music, and art. It's obvious from their tastes that they like things that appeal to the more primitive and base instincts.", 'Someone like a sports figure.  They have the mind of a child and act impulsively as well as exhibit a lack of reason.  Consequently they are often seen doing lousy behaviour like drinking, drugging, and fighting in public.  Not to mention they often have gaudy possessions to try to show off how rich they are but look annoying and of course of poor taste.']

Name: 3_trump_donald_bad_taste
Representative_Docs: ['Donald Trump because of his boorish behavior.', 'Donald Trump has incredibly bad taste. Hi apartment is hideous. His views and opinions, and approach to life in general, should be the poster child for bad taste.', 'President Donald Trump personified bad Taste. His behavior, his words and actions at times cause one to cringe. A lack of compassion leads him to terrible statements. A disregard to anyone who did not agree with him and his reaction is normally a crass remark.']
